violations.text: Multiple ceiling tiles were observed missing on the sales floor. Establishment is to replace the tiles. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2025

The floor in the back storage area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of under the aisles have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Establishment is to remove debris from under the aisles. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024
The ceiling tiles above the food aisles are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
